basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Resource Person Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT Patna) Resource Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://nielit.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NIELIT Patna Resource Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: 27- 35 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Commerce, Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce, Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / Computer Application, B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering
qualification.details: Resource Person (Account and Audit): Master’s Degree in Commerce from a recognized University/Institution with minimum relevant experience of 5 Years in accounting and/or Auditing with working knowledge of MS Office (MS word, Excel), Tally, GST and TDS etc. Desirables: CA or CA C.P.T., Good Communication, Presentation, and Documentation Skills. Resource Person (Account): Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce from a recognized University/Institution with minimum 3 years’ experience in relevant field with working knowledge of MS Office (MS word, Excel), Tally etc. Desirable Skills: Good Communication, Presentation, and Documentation Skills. Resource Person (Project I): Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science /Computer Application from a recognized University/Institution with 1-year experience. Desirables: Master’s in Artificial Intelligence. Resource Person (Project II): B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable Skills: Exposure to projects, internships, or training programs in relevant domains. Ability to assist in drafting documents and communicate effectively within the project team. Certification in soft skill or Public Relations (PR).

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NIELIT Patna?
faq.answer: NIELIT Patna has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the post of Resource Person. These positions are available on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for NIELIT Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Resource Person posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post and include Master’s Degree in Commerce, Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce, Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Application, and B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Resource Person posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Resource Person posts is up to 35 years. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Resource Person positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 22,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month, depending on the specific post and experience, as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIELIT Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of relevant certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Resource Person posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for NIELIT Patna Recruitment 2026 scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The exact venue address for the walk-in interview is not provided in the extracted data. Candidates should refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the cut-off date for determining age and experience?
faq.answer: The cut-off date for determining age and experience for this recruitment is 1 May 2026.
